ddls:
CREATE TABLE "consumers" (
  "id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each consumer */,
  "name" TEXT /* Full name of the consumer */,
  "firstname" TEXT /* First name of the consumer */,
  "zip" INTEGER /* Zip code of the consumer's address */,
  "city" TEXT /* City of the consumer's address */,
  "birthdate" TEXT /* Date of birth of the consumer */,
  "street" TEXT /* Street address of the consumer */,
  "housenr" INTEGER /* House number of the consumer's address */,
  "stateCode" TEXT /* State code of the consumer's address */,
  "state" TEXT /* State of the consumer's address */,
  "match" TEXT /* Matching status of the consumer record */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the consumer */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Phone number of the consumer */,
  "country_code" TEXT /* Country code of the consumer's address */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Last date and time the consumer record was updated */,
  "source_id" INTEGER /* ID of the primary data source for this consumer record */,
  "confidence_score" REAL /* Confidence score of the data accuracy */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("id")
)

CREATE TABLE "addresses" (
  "address_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each address */,
  "id" INTEGER /* ID of the consumer the address belongs to */,
  "street" TEXT /* Street address */,
  "housenr" INTEGER /* House number */,
  "zip" INTEGER /* Zip code */,
  "city" TEXT /* City */,
  "stateCode" TEXT /* State code */,
  "state" TEXT /* State */,
  "country_code" TEXT /* Country code of the address */,
  "latitude" REAL /* Latitude of the address */,
  "longitude" REAL /* Longitude of the address */,
  "address_type" TEXT /* Type of address (e.g., home, work) */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Last date and time the address record was updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("address_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_addresses_id FOREIGN KEY ("id") REFERENCES consumers ("id")
)

CREATE TABLE "demographics" (
  "demographic_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each demographic record */,
  "id" INTEGER /* ID of the consumer the demographic data belongs to */,
  "birthdate" TEXT /* Date of birth */,
  "age" INTEGER /* Age of the consumer */,
  "gender" TEXT /* Gender of the consumer */,
  "ethnicity" TEXT /* Ethnicity of the consumer */,
  "marital_status" TEXT /* Marital status of the consumer */,
  "education_level" TEXT /* Education level of the consumer */,
  "income_range" TEXT /* Income range of the consumer */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Last date and time the demographic record was updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("demographic_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_demographics_id FOREIGN KEY ("id") REFERENCES consumers ("id")
)

CREATE TABLE "matches" (
  "match_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each match */,
  "id" INTEGER /* ID of the consumer the match belongs to */,
  "match_value" TEXT /* Value of the matched record */,
  "match_date" TEXT /* Date when the match was recorded */,
  "match_algorithm" TEXT /* Algorithm used for matching */,
  "confidence_score" REAL /* Confidence score of the match */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("match_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_matches_id FOREIGN KEY ("id") REFERENCES consumers ("id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., data analyst, administrator, client) */,
  "password_hash" TEXT /* Hashed password for the user */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Last date and time the user logged in */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the user account (e.g., active, suspended) */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time the user account was created */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "access_logs" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access event */,
  "id" INTEGER /* ID of the consumer data being accessed */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the data */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date when the data was accessed */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access (e.g., view, download) */,
  "ip_address" TEXT /* IP address from which the access was made */,
  "user_agent" TEXT /* User agent string of the device used for access */,
  "session_id" TEXT /* Session ID of the user session */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_id FOREIGN KEY ("id") REFERENCES consumers ("id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "data_sources" (
  "data_source_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each data source */,
  "data_source_name" TEXT /* Name of the data source */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the data source */,
  "source_type" TEXT /* Type of the data source (e.g., API, CSV, database) */,
  "last_sync_date" TEXT /* Last date the data source was synchronized */,
  "sync_frequency" TEXT /* Frequency of synchronization (e.g., daily, weekly) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("data_source_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "consumer_data_sources" (
  "consumer_data_source_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each consumer data source */,
  "id" INTEGER /* ID of the consumer the data source belongs to */,
  "data_source_id" INTEGER /* ID of the data source */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Last date and time the data source record was updated */,
  "sync_status" TEXT /* Status of the last sync (e.g., success, failed) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("consumer_data_source_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_consumer_data_sources_id FOREIGN KEY ("id") REFERENCES consumers ("id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_consumer_data_sources_data_source_id FOREIGN KEY ("data_source_id") REFERENCES data_sources ("data_source_id")
)
